source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter for compact notification UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for multilingual alerts, inboxes, badges, forms, and operational dashboards.
layout: Compact notification-center density, 8px radius cards, thin lichen borders, crown-stripe highlight cadence, tight inbox rows, and quiet conifer-grove surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent kinglet crown motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a kinglet crown motif for the Morphous Kinglet design system: a compact golden-crowned kinglet-inspired bird head and upper-body cutout with the crown as the focal motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: realistic tiny kinglet with olive green back feathers, soft grey face and underside, fine dark eye, delicate beak, and a vivid yellow crown stripe edged with orange-gold and black feather markings; compact alert posture suited to a notification system.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; crown clearly visible from a slight three-quarter view, crisp feather edges, no cropping, clean separation.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves olive green, yellow crown, warm gold, and soft grey detail without cast shadows.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no forest background, no branch, no nest, no props, no decorative background, no additional species.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous Kinglet, derived from the visible kinglet crown motif: conifer grove, olive green feathers, vivid yellow crown, soft grey body, black crown edging, compact notification-system mood.
Reference use: Use the visible kinglet motif image as the source of truth for palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language. The board must visibly respect the bird's olive green wing, yellow crown stripe, orange-gold highlight, black eye/crown marks, soft grey feathers, and conifer-grove context.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design board, 3840 x 2160 px composition.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Kinglet", motif story "conifer grove", palette swatches, typography, Japanese typography, buttons, icon notification buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, toast notifications, cards, navigation/sidebar, notification inbox, dashboard/data widgets, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, forms, table, command/search, empty state, error state, loading state, texture samples, icon samples, spacing scale, radius tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, semantic token rows, generated asset preview.
Typography: include English examples and Japanese examples; choose clean compact product UI font guidance suitable for multilingual notification systems.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, compact notification center software, 8px card radius, thin grey-green borders, crown-stripe highlight rhythm, crisp controls, dense but readable operational interface.
Color palette: motif-derived colors only: conifer mist background, charcoal eye ink, olive primary, crown yellow accent, soft feather grey secondary, spruce muted surfaces, warm crown amber signal, bark shadow, lichen line, cream feather highlight.
Layout: organized dense but readable catalog board with full component coverage, notification widgets and badges prominent enough to inspect, no landing-page hero, no marketing copy.
Text: short readable UI labels only.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no tiny illegible paragraphs, no forest photo background.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Morphous Kinglet design-system board. It must feel like the same compact notification system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible kinglet motif and the visible light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, crown-stripe notification rhythm, component language, texture, spacing, typography, and full component coverage.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design board, 3840 x 2160 px composition.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Kinglet", "Dark Mode", palette swatches, typography, Japanese typography, buttons, icon notification buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, toast notifications, cards, navigation/sidebar, notification inbox, dashboard/data widgets, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, forms, table, command/search, empty state, error state, loading state, texture samples, icon samples, spacing scale, radius tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, semantic token rows, generated asset preview.
Visual details: dark background derived from charcoal eye and bark shadow, card surfaces from deep spruce and muted conifer green, bright text from feather cream and soft grey, primary olive controls, crown yellow accent for unread counts and focus rings, crown amber for warning states, subtle feather and conifer-needle textures, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, thin lichen-line borders.
Typography: include English examples and Japanese examples; clean compact product UI font guidance suitable for multilingual notification systems.
Layout: same dense organized board structure as the light board, notification widgets and data components prominent, no landing-page hero.
Text: short readable UI labels only.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible tiny paragraphs.
